arts.ttl: Report: Leeds United boss Daniel Farke names three signings he would like seal in January
arts.sum: Leeds United are fighting for promotion, but they are yet to make a signing in the January transfer window. But Whites boss Daniel Farke has provided the clearest indication yet of the areas he wants to strengthen if any new names were to come in.
